purpose_context: Cross-repo planning issue #16 surfaced that CLI emit, SaaS materializer, and durable drain disagree about how a review-rejection (in_review/approved -> planned) appears on the wire. This mission lands the contract source of truth — docstring, normative reason-shape recommendation, and conformance fixtures — so sibling missions in spec-kitty and spec-kitty-saas have a stable anchor to cite.
purpose_tldr: Document and codify forced backward lane transitions (review-rejection family) in the canonical WPStatusChanged contract.
